intro:
There is limited information available on the plant Nanorrhinum webbianum, however I was able to find information on another plant that may be the same or closely related: Nanorrhinum ramosissimum  or  Anisostephia webbiana 

Nanorrhinum ramosissimum, or Anisostephia webbiana is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Anisostephia webbiana is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion to treat respiratory issues, and as a tincture or extract to treat fever and rheumatism.
